title: fix(deps): update module github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock to v0.8.7
body:

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/gvisor-tap-vsock (github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock)</summary>

### [`v0.8.7`](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/releases/tag/v0.8.7)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/compare/v0.8.6...v0.8.7)

#### What's Changed

- Added EC2 Metadata Service Access Flag by [@​dpdornseifer](https://redirect.github.com/dpdornseifer) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/512](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/512)
- Don't show an ERROR when ignoring a RELEASE message by [@​jandubois](https://redirect.github.com/jandubois) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/529](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/529)
- Do not use RUN statement by [@​gbraad](https://redirect.github.com/gbraad) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/511](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/511)
- golangci-lint: migrate configuration to v2 schema  by [@​vyasgun](https://redirect.github.com/vyasgun) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/510](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/510)
- packit: Switch back to fedora-all alias by [@​cfergeau](https://redirect.github.com/cfergeau) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/506](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/506)

##### Dependency Updates

- build(deps): bump actions/checkout from 4 to 5 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in[https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/536](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/536)6
- build(deps): bump github.com/coreos/stream-metadata-go from 0.4.7 to 0.4.8 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in[https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/517](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/517)7 and [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/526](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/526)6
- build(deps): bump github.com/go-viper/mapstructure/v2 from 2.2.1 to 2.3.0 in /tools by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in[https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/518](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/518)8
- build(deps): bump github.com/golangci/golangci-lint/v2 from 2.1.6 to 2.3.1 in /tools by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in[https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/519](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/519)9 and[https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/532](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/532)2
- build(deps): bump github.com/miekg/dns from 1.1.65 to 1.1.68 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in[https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/507](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/507)7,[https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/523](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/523)3 and[https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/531](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/531)1
- build(deps): bump github.com/onsi/gomega from 1.37.0 to 1.38.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in[https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/527](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/527)7
- build(deps): bump github.com/vishvananda/netlink from 1.3.0 to 1.3.1 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in[https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/509](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/509)9
- build(deps): bump golang.org/x/crypto from 0.38.0 to 0.41.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in[https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/515](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/515)5,[https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/525](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/525)5 and[https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/535](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/535)5
- build(deps): bump golang.org/x/mod from 0.24.0 to 0.27.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in[https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/514](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/514)4,[https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/522](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/522)2 and [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/534](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/534)4
- build(deps): bump golang.org/x/sync from 0.14.0 to 0.15.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in[https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/516](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/516)6
